Notice Of Motion And Motion To Relieve Reciever And For Appointment Of Substitute Receiver And For Setting Dates For Filing Of Final Account And Report And Objections Thereon
Off Calendar May-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. JOHN W. BASSETT OF THE NIVEN & SMITH LAW OFFICES, TEL. NO. 981-5451 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF; ATTY. ANDREW E. MONACH OF THE MORRISON/FOERSTER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 268-7588 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT DR. GREENSPAN;
ATTY. EDWARD A. KOPLOWITZ OF HTE MACINNIS, DONNER, KOPLOWITZ, TEL. NO. 434-2400 APPEARING FOR THE RECEIVER WYLE; ATTY. MARK D. HUDAK OF THE LAW FIRM OF CARR MCCLELLAN & HORN, TEL. NO. (650) 342-9600 APPEARING FOR BOREL BANK.
RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : KEVIN GUILFOYLE'S Motion To Relieve Reciever And For Appointment Of Substitute Receiver And For Setting Dates For Filing Of Final Account And Report And Objections Thereon, RICHARD STOLL WILL BE THE NEW RECEIVER EFFECTIVE MAY 15, 2009 OR SUCH EARLIER DATE AS THE PARTIES ALL AGREE. STUART WEILL SHALL BE RELIEVED AS OF THAT DATE AND SHALL FILE FINAL REPORTS IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE CRC. THE PROPERTY SHALL BE LISTED FOR SALE OR LEASE AS SOON AS PRACTICABLE. IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON A REAL ESTATE AGENT, THE NEW RECEIVER MAY CHOOSE ONE IN HIS SOLE DISCRETION. THE RECEIVER WILL CONTINUE TO CARRY ON NEGOTIATIONS WITH USPS CONCERNING ANY REMAINING ISSUES WITH IT. DEFENDANT HAS ALL THE POWERS ACCORDED BY SECTION 1(6) OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WITH RESPECT TO PLANNING FOR AND NEGOTIATING WITH PROSPECTIVE NEW TENANTS SUBJECT ONLY TO THE SPECIFIC LIMITATIONS SET OUT IN THAT PROVISION. TO THE EXTENT THE 8/08 ORDER GAVE ANY OF THESE POWERS TO THE RECIEVER, THAT ORDER IS SUPERCEDED. THE RECEIVER IN CONSULTATION WITH THE PARTIES HAS THE AUTHORITY TO MAKE THE DECISION WITH RESPECT TO THE USPS AND AUTHORITY REGARDING SALE. MR. MONACH TO PREPARE ORDER AND THE PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189=301/PJB/ER
